text: Last class we invited friends and made plans.
Today we talk about the future.
Tomorrow
Next week
Soon
Vacation
Visit
Travel
I am going to travel next week.
She is going to visit her family.
We are going to take a vacation soon.
I am not going to work tomorrow.
Next week I am going to travel.
I am going to visit my family.
What are you going to do tomorrow?
Marcos, what are you going to do tomorrow?
Tomorrow I am going to work. But next week is special.
Special? Why? What are you going to do?
I am going to take a vacation. I am going to travel and visit my family.
That is wonderful! When are you going to leave?
Very soon! I am so happy. And what about you?
I am going to take a vacation soon.

Hi, it is me. I have great news. Next month I am going to travel. I am going to take a vacation. I am going to visit my sister in Belem. We are going to walk on the beach, and we are going to eat good food every day. I am so happy. The trip is soon. I am going to rest a lot. After the vacation, I am going to come back to work. I am going to tell you everything. Talk to you soon. Bye!

Hello, this is a message about next week. Tomorrow I am going to start a new project. On Monday we are going to have a big meeting. On Tuesday I am going to meet a new coworker. On Wednesday I am going to visit another office. The week is going to be busy, but it is going to be good. I am not going to rest much. I am going to work hard. See you next week. Thank you!

First, think about the future. Then say, next week I am going to travel. Next, say where you are going to go. After that, say what you are going to do there. Finally, say, I am going to have a great time.
Tomorrow
Next week
Soon
Vacation
Visit
Travel
Next week I am going to travel.
She is going to visit her family.
I am going to take a vacation.
I am going to work tomorrow.
The vacation is soon.
What are you going to do tomorrow?
I am going to visit my family.
I am not going to work tomorrow.
I am going to take a vacation soon.
